name: GenesiSF (Sega Genesis/Megadrive soundfont)
author: The Eight Bit
description: If I remember correctly, I got this from a free soundfont Archive page. However, there are plenty of free soundfont pages so it is hard to pinpoint the exact location of this soundfont. It has been in my storage for months if not years, and I have done one or two adjustments to it. Particularly, the switch of Power and Electric drum kits: The original power kit has a heavy electric kick and some 909-ish snare, while the electric kit has got a mondo kick and a better gated snare. Unfortunately, I can find no external info URLs, so these other info tabs are gonna be empty.
